examples: Barry Humphries's alter ego Dame Edna took the U.S. by storm.
Edna Swinson nudged him into the sitting room.
Edna: Pay attention, ladies, One, two. One, two.
Deanna Durbin was born Edna Mae Durbin on Dec. 4, 1921 in Winnipeg, Canada.
Edna Wilhermina Swaniker started a school in Botswana and has been an educator for 29 years.
